title: Add Meshtastic BLE drain/framing golden vectors
description: Why this exists: Meshtastic BLE carries raw protobuf messages and uses FromNum little-endian u32 notifications followed by repeated FromRadio reads until empty; serial/TCP stream headers must not be applied to BLE. What needs to be done: add golden vectors and tests for raw ToRadio protobuf write, FromNum notify/read-drain semantics, zero-length drain termination, and rejection of serial/TCP headers on BLE. Acceptance criteria: vectors cite meshtastic/protobufs and app behavior source commits; tests cover normal config sync, heartbeat queueStatus, text packet send, and empty queue drain.
notes: 2026-06-30 added Meshtastic BLE drain/framing golden vectors and tests. Extended test/vectors/meshtastic_app_compat.json from 11 to 14 vectors with heartbeat queueStatus, FromNum little-endian notify counter, and zero-length FromRadio empty-drain terminator; kept existing raw ToRadio/config/text/ACK/NAK/StreamAPI-prefix/oversized vectors. Updated generator, schema, README, and Python tests. Added jsonschema dev dependency and schema validation for vector files. Verification: PYTHONPATH=python/src python3 test/vectors/generate.py wrote 14 Meshtastic vectors; cd python && uv run python -m pytest tests/test_vectors.py passed 44/44; cd python && uv run --extra dev pytest tests/test_vectors.py -q passed 44/44; git diff --check passed; line-length guard passed. Reviews: Lorentz no issues and verified acceptance criteria; Zeno found QueueStatus drift coverage incomplete, fixed by including res/free/maxlen/mesh_packet_id and asserting those fields; Locke found heartbeat queueStatus incorrectly included top-level FromRadio.id and schema was not validated, fixed by omitting id to match Meshtastic PhoneAPI heartbeat behavior and adding jsonschema validation; Kant no issues after fixes and verified queueStatus field numbers/no id; Herschel/Euclid found stale decoded id after the no-id fix, fixed by removing decoded.id and adding test asserting queueStatus has no field 1; Singer final targeted review found no P0/P1/P2 blockers and verified stale-id/schema/test fixes. Note: full Python suite attempt by Singer reached 1665 passed, 1 skipped before hanging in tests/sim/test_renode_integration.py and was interrupted; targeted vector/schema suite passed.
close_reason: Added Meshtastic BLE drain/framing golden vectors with schema validation and review fixes.
